description_long: This chair features a modern, minimalist design with a smoothly curved wooden backrest and seat frame, seamlessly transitioning into the arm supports. The seat itself is padded with a gray fabric cushion, providing comfort and a subtle contrast to the natural wood finish. The backrest is open in the center, creating a visually light and airy appearance while still offering support. Four slender, metal legs in a dark finish provide stability and a contemporary touch, elevating the chair's overall aesthetic. The materials and construction suggest durability and suitability for both casual and formal urban settings. Its ergonomic form and stylish look make it ideal for public spaces such as cafes, waiting areas, or offices.
description: A modern chair with a curved wooden backrest, gray fabric seat cushion, and slender metal legs, blending comfort and contemporary style.
description_view_0: Front view shows the open, curved wooden backrest and the gray cushioned seat, with all four metal legs visible.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlights the continuous curve of the wooden backrest and arm support, as well as the seat's thickness.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full width of the wooden backrest and the back of the seat cushion, with the metal legs framing the base.
description_view_3: Right-side view mirrors the left, emphasizing the elegant curve of the wood and the seat's integration with the frame.
